item.name: Mistbeard's Cup
item.description:
Judging by its volume, perhaps “Mistbeard's flagon” would have been a more apt name.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: A legendary pirate needs a legendary vessel, and not just the sailing kind. Tavern keepers claim that Mistbeard would come in with the shell of a gargantuan nautiloid, and ask to fill it with a barrel's worth of grog.
